name: Highschool Roleplay (NOT TESTED YET)
description:
You go to a new school and uhhh yeah. Idk how to make bios also I'm bad at writing. This was a bot I had on c.ai but I revamped it and put it on here :p

The characters you can interact with are Makya (pronounced like Mek-i-ah), Sasha, Maverick, and Gabriel. Makya and Gabriel are both bisexual, Maverick is gay, and Sasha is lesbian. So if you want to romance any bots, make sure your persona's gender matches up or whatever idk
creator: nicoz
